rationale: Y independently verified the design against the actual upstream vLLM source (base_config.py, utils.py, fp8.py), correctly reproduced the human reviewers' 'correct migration, LGTM' conclusion, raised a non-blocking test-quality concern nearly identical to the ground-truth reviewer's, and explicitly caught the latent gap (hunyuan_image3_transformer.py still calling get_cache_scale) with accurate, well-calibrated severity noting it was later fixed on main — high recall, precision, and actionability. X's delivered output is a triple-duplicated single finding limited to the same latent-gap file, and its underlying diagnostics reveal it initially fabricated false-positive blockers against hunyuan_image3.py/qwen2_old.py (later 'dropped' but still present in the returned blockers/findings arrays), it hit max-iterations without completing, and it missed nearly every substantive point raised by the actual human reviewers, including the core design confirmation and the test-coverage nuance.
